content.text: The dashboard is disabled in the head deployment (`--include-dashboard=false`). To return HTTP 200 it must be enabled and bound to all interfaces. Let me fix the deployment too.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  code=$(kubectl -n ray exec curl-test -- curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://ray-head:8265/api/cluster_status 2>/dev/null)
  echo "attempt $i: $code"
  [ "$code" = "200" ] && break
  sleep 5
done
